feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: API_EQUIPMENT - How to Update the custom fields in API using PATCH Operation
entry.content:
As per business requirement, I have added Equipment  field User status ( standard field ) in  Standard API_EQUIPMENT  using CDS extended option.

GET Method : It is fetching the Equipment User status value successfully using Get method via Postman.

PATCH Method:  While Updating the Equipment user status is  getting failed using  Patch Method via Postman.

Kindly suggest me how to update the newly added customized fields value using PATCH Method for API_EQUIPMENT.

 

 

 

Regards,

 

S Surya

entry.title: Missing MRP Type error while processing the IDoc for the MATMAS07 message type in EWM
entry.content:
Hi colleagues, 

 

Business Case: We have the Reduced Message Type /BYGL/EWMMATMAS. In Segment E1MARCM, the MRP view fields are deselected as we don’t need in EWM or to keep per SAP’s recommended fields in this segment. (Refer the screenshots for the segment fields at the last in this document).

Even after reducing the MRP fields, still the MRP Type Missing error is coming.

 

Thanks a lot. 

 

Best regards,,

Edward

entry.title: Question regarding Reactive Maintenance (4HH_CA) Minor Work
entry.content:
Hi, this is a question regarding the EAM Minor Work Process.  We have given the authorization for the Maintenance Planner and the Maintenance Supervisor to create minor work maintenance request (Business Catalog SAP_EAM_BC_EXCP_MREQ_MNG_PC restriction type Notification Processing Context IECP_MN.

In the SAP test script for Reactive Maintenance (4HH_CA) section 5.3.1 Minor Work - Create Maintenance Request. The Maintenance Planner creates the minor work maintenance request and once created it is available in the Accepted tab in My Maintenance Request.

In the SAP test script for Reactive Maintenance (4HH_CA) section 5.3.2 Minor Work - Record Malfunction Details. The Maintenance Technician checks the accepted maintenance request and records the malfunction data for the maintenance request created by the planner.  The issue we have is that since the maintenance request for minor work was created by the Maintenance Planner, this request cannot be displayed to the Maintenance Technician.  Our presumption is that you can only see your own maintenance requests in My Maintenance Request.  Can you please confirm that there is an error in the SAP script, or if there is another way for the Maintenance Technician to Record Malfunction details and complete notification for minor work if the maintenance request was completed by the planner or the supervisor role.  Thank you

entry.title: CAT2 variant not displaying for users
entry.content: A variant was created in CAT2 to include a new column "Project Description". Variant was created and saved as "Project Description" in administrator but the users are not able to see it.  SAP Notes 2066612 & 2442592 have already been referenced and provide no solution.

entry.title: Multiple division assign in single shipping data plant
entry.content: I have two Division 40 and 50, i have assign 40 Division in Shipping plant for STO and now i am creating STPO for 50 Division Material, i have found 40 division in Shipping tab in PO but i want it will be 50 because in Material code it is 50, i can not change shipping configuration so kindly suggest any Badi or enhancement

entry.title: Issue with deleted Purchase Requisition still generating MRP demand (Fiori App F4795)
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am facing a situation related to purchase requisitions created by MRP and deleted via the Fiori App F4795 — Hand Over Purchase Requisitions (F4795).

Scenario:

A purchase requisition generated by MRP for the parent item was deleted via the Fiori App F4795 Hand Over Purchase Requisitions (Table EBAN, field LOEKZ = X).

However, the MRP still shows a Subassembly Requirement (BB) for the child item, with the same quantity and date as the deleted requisition.

The parent component (semi-finished product) still has a reservation that was not cleared (Table RESB, field KZEAR ≠ X).

  • Has anyone faced similar behavior, where a deleted requisition still generates MRP demand due to an open Subassembly Requirement or an uncleared reservation?
  • Is there any official solution or correction note for this?
  • What is the best practice to ensure that deleted requisitions do not continue generating demand in MRP when using F4795?

I have read the article by @Caetano about this app and would appreciate any help with this difficulty.

Thank you very much in advance for your support!

entry.title: PO custom delivery address not populating for limit line items
entry.content: We have a requirement to show custom delivery address corresponding to limit item of adobeform. However, when we added address using custom fields of  extension point MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM, the same is not getting in node of limit item but only purchase order item node. We cannot extend datasource as well.

entry.title: PIR price condition update when contract is created via BAPI
entry.content:
Please suggest on how we can update PIR price and conditions without skipping conditions logic through standard approach or if we can have any other FM/ BAPI available to perform this action.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Alation HANA DB Connector in violation of HANA Runtime License
entry.content:
Alation is a market leader in the Data Catalog space.  They show up in any kind of web research with BW, ECC, and other SAP connectors.  All of those connectors are really the same, an ODBC Connection to the HANA Database.  

As DBA's we know that metadata scans at the HANA level will bear no real fruit.  We should also know, that the Runtime License for S/4HANA does not allow ODBC connections by third parties.  In a nutshell, there appears to be no real support for S/4HANA to be connected to Alation.

If your company is assessing Alation, be very specific in your challenges on whether they work with SAP.  

That said, does anyone know if the Data Catalog in Datasphere will be a connector of any type to Third Party solutions like Collibra, or Alation?

entry.title: Supplier - extend existing record by multiple addresses is not visible in migrate your data app
entry.content:
How to make visible the supplier-extend existing record by multiple addresses in data migration cockpit?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: OBYC-EIN EKG G/L accounts shows message KI280 during MIRO
entry.content:
Hi Expert

We get one error message KI280 for G/L accounts determined by OBYC EIN and EKG in MIRO.

The context is we are in S/4 and margin Analysis is activated, and the purchase account EIN/EKG is used and their G/L accounts are not cost elements.

For this specific case, we have sales order related Purchase order - PO account assignment Category M, there is no issue during MIGO for these purchase accounts EIN/EKG.

PO price is changed after MIGO, and during MIRO, the difference due to PO price change triggers the posting to EIN/EKG, and system fills the Profitability segments PSG number to these two EIN/EKG lines, then the error message KI280 pops up when we attempts to post.

entry.title: Can SAP Best Practice Scenarios from Public Cloud be ported to SAP Best Practices Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,


The functional teams are looking at the various scenarios for SAP Best Practice Private Edition - and have found that the scenario is not available.  It is however available in the Public Cloud.  


Is there a way to activate retrofit these Public Cloud scenarios to Private Cloud.


Thanks.


 


PERSON_NAME


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Update/Swap Batch For Serialized Product In EWM During Deconsolidation From One HU To Different HU
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

We need to update the batch during deconsolidation in EWM for serialized product. We have tried the same process using tcode /SCWM/DCONS but unfortunately we are not able to update the batch. Please find the attached documentation for the same. 

 

Thanks

entry.title: PPDS CIF queue (SMQ1) in system issue due to missing access for S_RFCACL object
entry.content:
Issue Summary: In our SAP system, the PPDS CIF queue (SMQ1) is encountering errors due to missing authorization for the S_RFCACL object. This occurs when a standard user conducts inspection activities on PPDS-relevant materials. During the sync process between S/4HANA and PPDS via the CIF kernel (using LiveCache), the system attempts to establish a remote function call, resulting in a stuck queue entry in SMQ1 with error:

00024: S_RFCACL authorization or SMTACL entry not maintained

Concern: Although multiple KBAs are available, it's unclear whether it's safe to grant S_RFCACL access broadly to all end users. Since this issue can potentially occur for any user triggering PPDS integration, we're considering a blanket authorization but are unsure of the security implications.

Request: Could you advise whether it's safe to provide all users access to the S_RFCACL authorization object, or if there's a better alternative to resolve this issue permanently without compromising system security? At present, we cannot predetermine which users require this access, leading to uncertainty around access control best practices.

entry.title: Creating RK when the reference document is in a legacy system (ECC)
entry.content: We are moving from ECC to S4/HANA and are wondering how Corrective invoice requests (RK) can be created with reference when the reference document is in ECC.

entry.title: Authorization - Restrict BP tcode
entry.content:
Hi experts,

we are looking for a solution to the following problem:

To create and modify business partners of the contact person type, we have created a role with authorization for B_BUPA_RLT with 000000 and BUP001.

In addition, certain users should also have change authorization for customer data (only for roles FLCU00 and FLCU01). However, if these users also have the role for contact persons, then change authorization for central customer data (GP role 000000) is also possible.

How can this be stopped?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Activation of Multiple Best Practice Country Solutions and Languages
entry.content:
Dear Sir or Madame,


We are planning to implement the SAP Best Practices for the following languages and country versions in our S/4HANA environment:


Languages:




  • German (DE)




  • PERSON_NAME (EN)




  • Spanish (ES)




  • Portuguese (PT)




  • French (FR)




  • Dutch (NL)



Country Versions:




  • PERSON_NAME (DE)




  • United Kingdom (UK)




  • Spain (ES)




  • PERSON_NAME (FR)




  • Portugal (PT)




  • Netherlands (NL)




  • Belgium (BE)




  • United States (US)



In the current SAP Service Request process, it seems that only one country version can be selected at a time. However, our project requires the parallel activation of multiple country solutions and languages.


Could you please advise how to proceed in this case and let us know what additional costs would be associated with the activation of multiple country versions?


Looking forward to your feedback.


Best regards,
PERSON_NAME Miesen


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: in iw31 getting error agreement item contains a different material Message no 06 387
entry.content: in iw31 getting error agreement item contains a different material. While debugging i am seeing the material which is checked against the material present on agreement is blank. Where exactly should i fill the material on order so that comparison of it with agreement material wont get failed. Please note i have not checked the subcontracting flag. Does it needs to be checked mandatorily?

entry.title: Adobe Forms - Displaying nested loops
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I am working on an adobe form and the requirement is to display 3 nested loops on the form. Could you please help me with the steps to follow here. Attaching a screenshot of the requirement.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Cost element category 90 in S4 - alternative approaches
entry.content:
Hello 

i understand cost element category 90 in public cloud is discontinued and in private cloud it is not recommended but still supported. In public cloud the alternative seems to be CE Type 1 if needed margin analysis characteristics are not automatically populated (e.g as with WIP). In our case we need to post MA characteristics on regular accrual accounts so need the BS account as account assignment. I tried to open BS accounts as type 1 in our private cloud system: this requires me to set a balance carry forward account then which makes no sense plus also does not allow OI managment. 

So replacing CE Type 90 with 1 in a private cloud environment does not seem to be the solution. What else can i do to avoid CE Type 90?
